name: testChangeFraudControlPriority
description: Move Business unit control upMove Business unit control down
descriptionHtml: Move Business unit control upMove Business unit control down

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Move Business unit control upMove Business unit control down

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0723.145040 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit 0723.145040' business unit using filter
Click 'Move business unit control up' button
Check that the second Fraud Control is '0' priority now
Click 'Move business unit control down' button
Check that the second Fraud Control is '1' priority again
